metadata.description: Specification-first verified development with ATDD, layered quality gates, and review agents. Polyglot: Go and TypeScript/React.

plugins.name: verified-development
plugins.description: Specification-first development workflow with ATDD, layered verification gates, and two-stage review agents. Enforces TDD, mechanical quality gates (lint, test, coverage, security, dead code), and AI-powered code review. Language-aware: Go, plus TypeScript/React (strict typing, functional patterns, DDD, hexagonal architecture, front-end testing).
